ddls:
CREATE TABLE "phases" (
  "phase_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each phase */,
  "phase_name" TEXT /* Name of the phase */,
  "start_block_height" INTEGER /* Start block height of the phase */,
  "end_block_height" INTEGER /* End block height of the phase */,
  "reward" REAL /* Reward amount in TELOX for this phase */,
  "masternode_share" REAL /* Percentage share for masternodes */,
  "pos_staker_share" REAL /* Percentage share for PoS stakers */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Indicate if the phase is currently active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the phase was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the phase was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("phase_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "blockchain" (
  "block_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each block */,
  "block_height" INTEGER /* Height of the block in the blockchain */,
  "phase_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the current phase (foreign key) */,
  "miner_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the miner who created the block */,
  "block_hash" TEXT /* Unique hash of the block */,
  "previous_block_hash" TEXT /* Hash of the previous block in the chain */,
  "difficulty" INTEGER /* Difficulty level of the block */,
  "size" INTEGER /* Size of the block in bytes */,
  "reward" REAL /* Total reward for the block */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the block was created */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the block was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the block was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("block_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_blockchain_phase_id FOREIGN KEY ("phase_id") REFERENCES phases ("phase_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_blockchain_miner_id FOREIGN KEY ("miner_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rewards" (
  "reward_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reward */,
  "block_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the block where the reward was generated */,
  "masternode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the masternode receiving the reward */,
  "pos_staker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the PoS staker receiving the reward */,
  "miner_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the miner who created the block */,
  "block_hash" TEXT /* Hash of the block where the reward was generated */,
  "reward_amount" REAL /* Amount of TELOX rewarded */,
  "reward_type" TEXT /* Type of reward (e.g., block reward, transaction fee) */,
  "distribution_date" TEXT /* Date when the reward was distributed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the reward (e.g., pending, distributed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the reward was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the reward was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reward_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rewards_miner_id FOREIGN KEY ("miner_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rewards_pos_staker_id FOREIGN KEY ("pos_staker_id") REFERENCES pos_stakers ("staker_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rewards_masternode_id FOREIGN KEY ("masternode_id") REFERENCES masternodes ("masternode_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rewards_block_id FOREIGN KEY ("block_id") REFERENCES blockchain ("block_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "masternodes" (
  "masternode_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each masternode */,
  "masternode_address" TEXT /* Blockchain address of the masternode */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the owner of the masternode */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the masternode (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "last_active" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last activity */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the masternode was created */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the masternode was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the masternode was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("masternode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pos_stakers" (
  "staker_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each staker */,
  "staker_address" TEXT /* Blockchain address of the staker */,
  "stake_amount" REAL /* Amount staked by the user */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the staker (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "last_active" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last activity */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the staker registered */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the staker was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the staker was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("staker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user's role */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the user registered */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., admin, user) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of permissions associated with the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_masternodes" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who owns the masternode */,
  "masternode_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the masternode owned by the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the mapping was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the mapping was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "masternode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_stakes" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who is a PoS staker */,
  "staker_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the staker owned by the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the mapping was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the mapping was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "staker_id")
)
